description: Visão 360 de clientes e suas transações.

latestCypherQueries.query: MATCH (pt:ProductType)<-[:HAS_TYPE]-(p:Product)<-[:OF_PRODUCT]-(t:Transaction)<-[:FROM]-(c:Consumer) WHERE c.consumer_id = $consumer_consumer_id RETURN pt.product_type_name AS productType, count(t) AS transactionCount ORDER BY transactionCount DESC LIMIT 10
MATCH (pt:ProductType)<-[:HAS_TYPE]-(p:Product)<-[:OF_PRODUCT]-(t:Transaction) RETURN pt.product_type_name AS productType, count(t) AS transactionCount ORDER BY transactionCount DESC LIMIT 10

/* total de transações do consumer
 */

MATCH (c:Consumer)-[:FROM]->(t:Transaction) where c.consumer_id = $consumer_consumer_id
RETURN count(t) AS total_transactions

/* total de transações do consumer
 */

MATCH (c:Consumer)-[:TO]->(t:Transaction) where c.consumer_id = $consumer_consumer_id
RETURN count(t) AS total_transactions

/* total de transaçõe do consumer
 */

MATCH (c:Consumer)-[:FROM]->(t:Transaction) where c.consumer_id = $consumer_consumer_id
RETURN count(t) AS total_transactions

/* total de transaçõe do consumer
 */

MATCH (c:Consumer)-[:FROM]->(t:Transaction)
RETURN c.consumer_id, count(t) AS total_transactions

latestCypherQueries.query: MATCH (c:Consumer)-[:OPENED_TICKET]->(st:SupportTicket) WHERE c.consumer_id = $consumer_consumer_id RETURN c.consumer_id AS ConsumerID, c.email_domain AS EmailDomain, st.ticket_id AS TicketID, st.severity AS Severity, st.topic AS Topic, st.resolved_at AS ResolvedAt ORDER BY st.resolved_at DESC LIMIT 20

MATCH (c:Consumer)-[:OPENED_TICKET]->(st:SupportTicket) WHERE st.is_problematic_case = true  and c.consumer_id = $consumer_consumer_id RETURN c.consumer_id AS ConsumerID, c.email_domain AS EmailDomain, st.ticket_id AS TicketID, st.severity AS Severity, st.topic AS Topic, st.resolved_at AS ResolvedAt ORDER BY st.resolved_at DESC LIMIT 20

MATCH (c:Consumer)-[:OPENED_TICKET]->(st:SupportTicket) WHERE st.is_problematic_case = true RETURN c.consumer_id AS ConsumerID, c.email_domain AS EmailDomain, st.ticket_id AS TicketID, st.severity AS Severity, st.topic AS Topic, st.resolved_at AS ResolvedAt ORDER BY st.resolved_at DESC LIMIT 20

RETURN c2.consumer_id AS similar_consumer_id, round(s.similarity_score,2) AS similarity_score

settings.markdown:
###### Recomendação Baseado em 3 Pilares: 

| ID| Critério|
|--------|--------|
| 1| Similaridades de Jornadas / Consumers (Embeddings)|
| 2| Popularidades de Produtos|
| 3| Perfil dos Consumers|
| 4| Recência de Compra|

**O que a Similaridade de Jornada Considera?**

Componentes da Similaridade (FastRP + Cosine Similarity)
1. Estrutura da Jornada (Topologia do Grafo)
- Sequência de eventos: Transaction → SupportTicket → Transaction → MetricSnapshot
- Ordem dos acontecimentos: Primeiro evento, eventos intermediários, último evento
- Comprimento da jornada: Quantos eventos totais aconteceram
- Padrões de navegação: Quais tipos de eventos seguem quais outros
2. Timing Entre Eventos (Pesos)

- Velocidade da jornada: Quanto tempo entre eventos consecutivos
- Peso do relacionamento NEXT: weight = 1.0 / (1.0 + days_until_next)
- Eventos próximos no tempo têm peso maior
- Eventos distantes no tempo têm peso menor
- Ritmo de atividade: Jornadas rápidas vs lentas

3. Tipos de Eventos (Labels dos Nodes)

- Proporção de Transactions: Quanto da jornada é transação
- Proporção de SupportTickets: Quanto da jornada é suporte
- Proporção de MetricSnapshots: Quanto da jornada é atualização de Metricas

latestCypherQueries.query:
MATCH p1 = (c:Consumer {consumer_id: $consumer_consumer_id})-[:FIRST]->(first)
MATCH path = (first)-[:NEXT*0..20]->(event)
RETURN c, path,p1

latestCypherQueries.query:
// Volume total por rede (simplificado)
MATCH (c:Consumer)
WHERE c.collusion_component_id IS NOT NULL
WITH c.collusion_component_id as component, collect(c) as members
WHERE size(members) >= 5

// Todas as transações originadas na rede
UNWIND members as consumer
OPTIONAL MATCH (consumer)-[:FROM]->(t:Transaction)
WITH component,
     size(members) as num_membros,
     sum(t.paid_total_value) as volume_total,
     count(t) as num_transacoes

RETURN
    round(Sum(volume_total),1)

// Volume total por rede (simplificado)
MATCH (c:Consumer)
WHERE c.collusion_component_id IS NOT NULL
WITH c.collusion_component_id as component, collect(c) as members
WHERE size(members) >= 5

// Todas as transações originadas na rede
UNWIND members as consumer
OPTIONAL MATCH (consumer)-[:FROM]->(t:Transaction)
WITH component,
     size(members) as num_membros,
     sum(t.paid_total_value) as volume_total,
     count(t) as num_transacoes

RETURN
    round(Sum(volume_total),2)

// Volume total por rede (simplificado)
MATCH (c:Consumer)
WHERE c.collusion_component_id IS NOT NULL
WITH c.collusion_component_id as component, collect(c) as members
WHERE size(members) >= 5

// Todas as transações originadas na rede
UNWIND members as consumer
OPTIONAL MATCH (consumer)-[:FROM]->(t:Transaction)
WITH component,
     size(members) as num_membros,
     sum(t.paid_total_value) as volume_total,
     count(t) as num_transacoes

RETURN
    round(Sum(volume_total),3)

// Volume total por rede (simplificado)
MATCH (c:Consumer)
WHERE c.collusion_component_id IS NOT NULL
WITH c.collusion_component_id as component, collect(c) as members
WHERE size(members) >= 5

// Todas as transações originadas na rede
UNWIND members as consumer
OPTIONAL MATCH (consumer)-[:FROM]->(t:Transaction)
WITH component,
     size(members) as num_membros,
     sum(t.paid_total_value) as volume_total,
     count(t) as num_transacoes

RETURN
    Sum(volume_total)

/* total de Consumers compartilhando devices e location  */

MATCH (c:Consumer)-[:HAS_DEVICE]->(d:Device)<-[:HAS_DEVICE]-(c2:Consumer)
MATCH (c)-[:AT_LOCATION]->(l:Location)<-[:AT_LOCATION]-(c2)
RETURN count(DISTINCT c) AS total_consumers_sharing_devices_and_locations

latestCypherQueries.query:
/* total de Consumers compartilhando devices */

MATCH (c:Consumer)-[:HAS_DEVICE]->(d:Device)
WITH d, COUNT(c) AS consumerCount
WHERE consumerCount > 1
RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT d) AS sharedDeviceCount

MATCH path =
  (c1:Consumer)
  ((:Consumer)-[:FROM]->(t:Transaction)-[:TO]->(:Consumer)){5}
  (c1)
WHERE head(t).is_pix = true
  AND all(tx IN t WHERE tx.transaction_date = head(t).transaction_date)
RETURN count(path);

MATCH path =
  (c1:Consumer)
  ((:Consumer)-[:FROM]->(t:Transaction)-[:TO]->(:Consumer)){5}
  (c1)
WHERE head(t).is_pix = true
  AND all(tx IN t WHERE tx.transaction_date = head(t).transaction_date)
RETURN path;

WHERE consumerCount > 1
RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT d) AS sharedDeviceCount

MATCH (c)-[:AT_LOCATION]->(l:Location)<-[:AT_LOCATION]-(c2)
RETURN toString(count(DISTINCT c)) + ' Consumers' AS total_consumers_sharing_devices_and_locations

/* total de Consumers compartilhando devices e location  */

MATCH (c)-[:AT_LOCATION]->(l:Location)<-[:AT_LOCATION]-(c2)

MATCH (c:Consumer)-[:HAS_DEVICE]->(d:Device)<-[:HAS_DEVICE]-(c2:Consumer)
MATCH (c)-[:AT_LOCATION]->(l:Location)<-[:AT_LOCATION]-(c2)
RETURN count(DISTINCT c) AS toString(total_consumers_sharing_devices_and_locations) + 'Compartilhados'

/* total de Consumers compartilhando devices */

MATCH (c:Consumer)-[:HAS_DEVICE]->(d:Device)

widgets.title: Score Fraude - Possíveis - Redes de Conluio

latestCypherQueries.query:
// Identificar componentes de conluio COM comportamento fraudulento
MATCH (c:Consumer)
WHERE c.collusion_component_id IS NOT NULL

// Agrupar por componente
WITH c.collusion_component_id as component, collect(c) as members
WHERE size(members) >= 3 // 3+ pessoas = rede

// Métricas de fraude do componente
UNWIND members as consumer

// Transações PIX circulares
OPTIONAL MATCH (consumer)-[:FROM]->(t1:Transaction)-[:TO]->(other:Consumer)
WHERE other IN members AND t1.is_pix = true
WITH component, members, consumer, count(t1) as pix_internos

// Registros próximos (coordenados)
WITH component, members,
     sum(pix_internos) as total_pix_internos,
     [m IN members | m.registered_at] as registration_dates
WITH component, members, total_pix_internos,
     reduce(same_day = 0, i IN range(0, size(registration_dates)-2) |
            same_day + CASE
                WHEN duration.between(registration_dates[i], registration_dates[i+1]).days <= 1
                THEN 1 ELSE 0
            END
     ) as registros_coordenados

// Devices compartilhados
UNWIND members as m1
MATCH (m1)-[:HAS_DEVICE]->(d:Device {collusion_component_id: component})
WITH component, members, total_pix_internos, registros_coordenados,
     count(DISTINCT d) as devices_compartilhados

// Endereços compartilhados
UNWIND members as m2
MATCH (m2)-[:AT_LOCATION]->(addr:Location)<-[:AT_LOCATION]-(m1)
WITH component, members, total_pix_internos, registros_coordenados,
     devices_compartilhados,
     count(DISTINCT addr) as enderecos_compartilhados

// Score de fraude
WITH component,
     size(members) as num_membros,
     devices_compartilhados,
     enderecos_compartilhados,
     total_pix_internos,
     registros_coordenados,
     (size(members) * 25) +
     (devices_compartilhados * 15) +
     (enderecos_compartilhados * 15) +
     (total_pix_internos * 10) +
     (registros_coordenados * 20) as fraud_score
WHERE fraud_score >= 100 // Threshold crítico

RETURN component as rede_id,
       num_membros,
       devices_compartilhados,
       enderecos_compartilhados,
       total_pix_internos,
       registros_coordenados,
       fraud_score,
       CASE
           WHEN fraud_score >= 275 THEN '🔴 BLOQUEIO SUGERIDO'
           WHEN fraud_score >= 150 THEN '🟠 INVESTIGAÇÃO'
           ELSE '🟡 MONITORAR'
       END as acao_recomendada
ORDER BY fraud_score DESC
LIMIT 20;

     reduce(same_day = 0, i IN range(0, size(registration_dates)-2) |
            same_day + CASE
                WHEN duration.between(registration_dates[i], registration_dates[i+1]).days <= 1
                THEN 1 ELSE 0
            END
     ) as registros_coordenados

// Devices compartilhados
UNWIND members as m1
MATCH (m1)-[:HAS_DEVICE]->(d:Device {collusion_component_id: component})
WITH component, members, total_pix_internos, registros_coordenados,
     count(DISTINCT d) as devices_compartilhados

// Endereços compartilhados
UNWIND members as m2
MATCH (m2)-[:AT_LOCATION]->(addr:Location)
WITH component, members, total_pix_internos, registros_coordenados,
     devices_compartilhados,
     count(DISTINCT addr) as enderecos_compartilhados

// Score de fraude
WITH component,
     size(members) as num_membros,
     devices_compartilhados,
     enderecos_compartilhados,
     total_pix_internos,
     registros_coordenados,
     (size(members) * 25) +
     (devices_compartilhados * 15) +
     (enderecos_compartilhados * 15) +
     (total_pix_internos * 10) +
     (registros_coordenados * 20) as fraud_score
WHERE fraud_score >= 100 // Threshold crítico

RETURN component as rede_id,
       num_membros,
       devices_compartilhados,
       enderecos_compartilhados,
       total_pix_internos,
       registros_coordenados,
       fraud_score,
       CASE
           WHEN fraud_score >= 255 THEN '🔴 BLOQUEIO SUGERIDO'
           WHEN fraud_score >= 150 THEN '🟠 INVESTIGAÇÃO'
           ELSE '🟡 MONITORAR'
       END as acao_recomendada
ORDER BY fraud_score DESC
LIMIT 20;

// Identificar componentes de conluio COM comportamento fraudulento
MATCH (c:Consumer)
WHERE c.collusion_component_id IS NOT NULL

// Agrupar por componente
WITH c.collusion_component_id as component, collect(c) as members
WHERE size(members) >= 3 // 3+ pessoas = rede

// Métricas de fraude do componente
UNWIND members as consumer

// Transações PIX circulares
OPTIONAL MATCH (consumer)-[:FROM]->(t1:Transaction)-[:TO]->(other:Consumer)
WHERE other IN members AND t1.is_pix = true
WITH component, members, consumer, count(t1) as pix_internos

// Registros próximos (coordenados)
WITH component, members,
     sum(pix_internos) as total_pix_internos,
     [m IN members | m.registered_at] as registration_dates
WITH component, members, total_pix_internos,
     reduce(same_day = 0, i IN range(0, size(registration_dates)-2) |
            same_day + CASE
                WHEN duration.between(registration_dates[i], registration_dates[i+1]).days <= 1
                THEN 1 ELSE 0
            END
     ) as registros_coordenados

// Devices compartilhados
UNWIND members as m1
MATCH (m1)-[:HAS_DEVICE]->(d:Device {collusion_component_id: component})
WITH component, members, total_pix_internos, registros_coordenados,
     count(DISTINCT d) as devices_compartilhados

// Endereços compartilhados
UNWIND members as m2
MATCH (m2)-[:AT_LOCATION]->(addr:Location)
WITH component, members, total_pix_internos, registros_coordenados,
     devices_compartilhados,
     count(DISTINCT addr) as enderecos_compartilhados

// Score de fraude
WITH component,
     size(members) as num_membros,
     devices_compartilhados,
     enderecos_compartilhados,
     total_pix_internos,
     registros_coordenados,
     (size(members) * 25) +
     (devices_compartilhados * 15) +
     (enderecos_compartilhados * 15) +
     (total_pix_internos * 10) +
     (registros_coordenados * 20) as fraud_score
WHERE fraud_score >= 100 // Threshold crítico

RETURN component as rede_id,
       num_membros,
       devices_compartilhados,
       enderecos_compartilhados,
       total_pix_internos,
       registros_coordenados,
       fraud_score,
       CASE
           WHEN fraud_score >= 255 THEN '🔴 BLOQUEIO SUGERIDO'
           WHEN fraud_score >= 150 THEN '🟠 INVESTIGAÇÃO'
           ELSE '🟡 MONITORAR'
       END as acao_recomendada
ORDER BY fraud_score DESC
LIMIT 10;

settings.query:
// Identificar componentes de conluio COM comportamento fraudulento
MATCH (c:Consumer)
WHERE c.collusion_component_id IS NOT NULL

// Agrupar por componente
WITH c.collusion_component_id as component, collect(c) as members
WHERE size(members) >= 3 // 3+ pessoas = rede

// Métricas de fraude do componente
UNWIND members as consumer

// Transações PIX circulares
OPTIONAL MATCH (consumer)-[:FROM]->(t1:Transaction)-[:TO]->(other:Consumer)
WHERE other IN members AND t1.is_pix = true
WITH component, members, consumer, count(t1) as pix_internos

// Registros próximos (coordenados)
WITH component, members,
     sum(pix_internos) as total_pix_internos,
     [m IN members | m.registered_at] as registration_dates
WITH component, members, total_pix_internos,
     reduce(same_day = 0, i IN range(0, size(registration_dates)-2) |
            same_day + CASE
                WHEN duration.between(registration_dates[i], registration_dates[i+1]).days <= 1
                THEN 1 ELSE 0
            END
     ) as registros_coordenados

// Devices compartilhados
UNWIND members as m1
MATCH (m1)-[:HAS_DEVICE]->(d:Device {collusion_component_id: component})
WITH component, members, total_pix_internos, registros_coordenados,
     count(DISTINCT d) as devices_compartilhados

// Endereços compartilhados
UNWIND members as m2
MATCH (m2)-[:AT_LOCATION]->(addr:Location)<-[:AT_LOCATION]-(m1)
WITH component, members, total_pix_internos, registros_coordenados, 
     devices_compartilhados,
     count(DISTINCT addr) as enderecos_compartilhados

// Score de fraude
WITH component,
     size(members) as num_membros,
     devices_compartilhados,
     enderecos_compartilhados,
     total_pix_internos,
     registros_coordenados,
     (size(members) * 25) +
     (devices_compartilhados * 15) +
     (enderecos_compartilhados * 15) +
     (total_pix_internos * 10) +
     (registros_coordenados * 20) as fraud_score
WHERE fraud_score >= 100 // Threshold crítico

RETURN component as rede_id,
       num_membros,
       devices_compartilhados,
       enderecos_compartilhados,
       total_pix_internos,
       registros_coordenados,
       fraud_score,
       CASE
           WHEN fraud_score >= 275 THEN '🔴 BLOQUEIO SUGERIDO'
           WHEN fraud_score >= 150 THEN '🟠 INVESTIGAÇÃO'
           ELSE '🟡 MONITORAR'
       END as acao_recomendada
ORDER BY fraud_score DESC
LIMIT 13;

latestCypherQueries.query:
// Volume total por rede (simplificado)
MATCH (c:Consumer)
WHERE c.collusion_component_id IS NOT NULL
WITH c.collusion_component_id as component, collect(c) as members
WHERE size(members) >= 5

// Todas as transações originadas na rede
UNWIND members as consumer
OPTIONAL MATCH (consumer)-[:FROM]->(t:Transaction)
WITH component,
     size(members) as num_membros,
     sum(t.paid_total_value) as volume_total,
     count(t) as num_transacoes

RETURN
    round(Sum(volume_total),1)

latestCypherQueries.query:
// Usuários que mais aparecem em ciclos
MATCH path =
  (c1:Consumer)
  ((:Consumer)-[:FROM]->(t:Transaction)-[:TO]->(:Consumer)){3,5}
  (c1)

RETURN
    c1.consumer_id as usuario,
    count(path) as num_ciclos,
    sum([tx IN nodes(path) WHERE tx:Transaction | tx.paid_total_value][0]) as volume_total

ORDER BY num_ciclos DESC
LIMIT 20;

// Usuários que mais aparecem em ciclos
MATCH path =
  (c1:Consumer)
  ((:Consumer)-[:FROM]->(:Transaction)-[:TO]->(:Consumer)){3,5}
  (c1)

RETURN
    c1.consumer_id as usuario,
    count(path) as num_ciclos,
    sum([tx IN nodes(path) | tx.paid_total_value][0]) as volume_total

ORDER BY num_ciclos DESC
LIMIT 20;

// Análise de valores circulares
MATCH path =
  (c1:Consumer)
  ((:Consumer)-[:FROM]->(:Transaction)-[:TO]->(:Consumer)){3,5}
  (c1)

WITH [tx IN relationships(path) | tx.amount] as valores

RETURN
    count(*) as total_ciclos,
    avg(valores[0]) as valor_medio,
    min(valores[0]) as valor_minimo,
    max(valores[0]) as valor_maximo,
    sum(valores[0]) as volume_total;

// Usuários que mais aparecem em ciclos
MATCH path =
  (c1:Consumer)
  ((:Consumer)-[:FROM]->(:Transaction)-[:TO]->(:Consumer)){3,5}
  (c1)

RETURN
    c1.consumer_id as usuario,
    count(path) as num_ciclos,
    sum([tx IN relationships(path) | tx.paid_total_value][0]) as volume_total

ORDER BY num_ciclos DESC
LIMIT 20;

// Usuários que mais aparecem em ciclos
MATCH path =
  (c1:Consumer)
  ((:Consumer)-[:FROM]->(:Transaction)-[:TO]->(:Consumer)){4,5}
  (c1)

RETURN

    count(path) as num_ciclos,
    sum([tx IN relationships(path) | tx.paid_total_value][0]) as volume_total

ORDER BY num_ciclos DESC
LIMIT 20;
